steps.title: Convert servings to rates
steps.content: Yogurt provides $1$ microgram per $4.0$ ounces, so its rate is $\frac{1}{4.0}=0.25$ micrograms per ounce. Salmon provides $1$ microgram per $1.5$ ounces, so its rate is about $\frac{1}{1.5}=0.67$ micrograms per ounce.

steps.title: Write the total amount
steps.content: For $x$ ounces of yogurt and $y$ ounces of salmon, multiply each amount by its rate and set the sum equal to the total vitamin B12 consumed. $$0.25x+0.67y=2.1$$ The answer is B.
